top_signals.title: Oil Slumps as US-Iran Deal May Allow Strait of Hormuz to Reopen
top_signals.summary: Oil sank after the US and Iran agreed to a peace deal to end the war in the Middle East, potentially allowing the Strait of Hormuz to reopen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S., Iran reach peace deal, signing set for Friday, Pakistan says
top_signals.summary: The agreement was struck despite an Israeli strike on Lebanon on Sunday that drew criticism from both Iran and U.S. President Donald Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
